name: @cognitum-one/apicompletions
description: Cognitum Fugu (ADR-203) — OpenAI-compatible, metered, tiered /v1/chat/completions Cloud Run service behind api.cognitum.one. TS/Node sibling of @cognitum-one/api-gateway.

comments.deferred-deps: Wired during Phase-1 implementation (kept out of the skeleton to keep install fast + green): firebase-admin (Firestore api_keys/usage_ledger), @google-cloud/pubsub (completions-usage), js-tiktoken + per-family tokenizers (§5.1 progressive billing floor). @midstream/wasm is a FUTURE optionalDependency (404 on npm today — §3.5) loaded via the dynamic-import firewall in src/midstream/firewall.ts, never declared as a hard dep.
